languages.text: {n}Полковник кивает, а затем привычно, по-звериному, ухмыляется.{/n} "Я кровью пролитой, льющейся и той, что пролью, клянусь в том, что моя жизнь, душа и верность без остатка принадлежат тебе, {name} фон Валанциус".

{n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник кивает, а затем привычно, по-звериному, ухмыляется.{/n} "Я кровью пролитой, льющейся и той, что пролью, клянусь в том, что моя жизнь, душа и верность без остатка принадлежат тебе, {name} фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

{n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

{n}And once again you find yourself facing the beast. But this time, a cornered one. He glares at you before giving up and nodding.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood being spilled, and the blood that will be spilled, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to {name} von Valancius."

{n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

{n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

{n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

languages.text: {n}そして再び、あなたは獣と対峙する。だが今度は追い詰められた獣だ。彼はあなたをにらみつけたのち、観念してうなずく。{/n}「流れた血、今まさに流れている血、そしてこれから流れる血にかけて誓う。私の命、魂、そして一切の留保なき忠誠は、{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスのものだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}And once again you find yourself facing the beast. But this time, a cornered one. He glares at you before giving up and nodding.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood being spilled, and the blood that will be spilled, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}そして再び、あなたは獣と対峙する。だが今度は追い詰められた獣だ。彼はあなたをにらみつけたのち、観念してうなずく。{/n}「流れた血、今まさに流れている血、そしてこれから流れる血にかけて誓う。私の命、魂、そして一切の留保なき忠誠は、{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスのものだ。」

languages.text: {n}Le colonel acquiesce, puis esquisse le sourire carnassier qui le caractérise.{/n} « Sur le sang qui a été, qui est et qui sera versé, je jure que ma vie, mon âme et ma loyauté appartiennent sans réserve à {name} von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel acquiesce, puis esquisse le sourire carnassier qui le caractérise.{/n} « Sur le sang qui a été, qui est et qui sera versé, je jure que ma vie, mon âme et ma loyauté appartiennent sans réserve à {name} von Valancius. »

languages.text: {n}Albay başını sallıyor, sonra tanıdık yırtıcı sırıtışını takınıyor.{/n} "Dökülen kanın, şimdi dökülen kanın ve dökeceğim kanın üzerine yemin ederim ki... Hayatım, ruhum ve sadakatim; kayıtsız şartsız {name} von Valancius'a aittir."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay başını sallıyor, sonra tanıdık yırtıcı sırıtışını takınıyor.{/n} "Dökülen kanın, şimdi dökülen kanın ve dökeceğim kanın üzerine yemin ederim ki... Hayatım, ruhum ve sadakatim; kayıtsız şartsız {name} von Valancius'a aittir."

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel nickt und grinst dich schließlich raubtierhaft an.{/n} "Ich schwöre beim gestern, heute und zukünftig vergossenen Blut, dass mein Leben, meine Seele und meine Loyalität ohne Einschränkung Euch, {name} von Valancius, gehört."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel nickt und grinst dich schließlich raubtierhaft an.{/n} "Ich schwöre beim gestern, heute und zukünftig vergossenen Blut, dass mein Leben, meine Seele und meine Loyalität ohne Einschränkung Euch, {name} von Valancius, gehört."

languages.text: {n}El coronel asiente y te muestra su habitual sonrisa de depredador.{/n} «Juro por la sangre ya derramada, la sangre que se derrama y la sangre que se derramará que mi vida, alma y lealtad pertenecen sin reservas a {name} von Valancius».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel asiente y te muestra su habitual sonrisa de depredador.{/n} «Juro por la sangre ya derramada, la sangre que se derrama y la sangre que se derramará que mi vida, alma y lealtad pertenecen sin reservas a {name} von Valancius».

languages.text: {n}上校点点头，随后露出那熟悉的掠食者般的笑容。{/n}“我以已流之血、正流之血、以及将流之血起誓，我的生命、灵魂和毫无保留的忠诚，都归于您，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校点点头，随后露出那熟悉的掠食者般的笑容。{/n}“我以已流之血、正流之血、以及将流之血起誓，我的生命、灵魂和毫无保留的忠诚，都归于您，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯。”
